config.seed_text: A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.prompt:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Continue the following text. Do not explain your process.

TEXT:
A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.
records.delta_text: But it would be impossible for all users to remember one word even when this had happened at any time before – just as with most languages! Here is an example of that same situation where only 1 sentence (or 2) has been typed out or spoken during 3 successive sequences; we know about some other "sentence" being used again earlier than needed because our own messages now look like these words without giving us context by default…and thus don't understand what they mean—all
